name: Anusandhan - The Search
overview: Anumita Sen, an investigative journalist, uncovers a conspiracy when she discovers a pregnant inmate, Lolita, in Rooppur Jail. As witnesses disappear and she’s framed for murder, Anumita finds herself imprisoned, tortured, and racing against time to expose the truth before it’s buried forever.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Anusandhan (অনুসন্ধান) | Subhashree Ganguly | Aditi Roy | 7 NOV | hoichoi
